title: What Scripture actually says about the single man
caption:
God doesn't think your singleness is a problem.

Paul called it a charism — a grace-gift. Not a consolation prize. A tool God hands a man for a season so he can give himself entirely to one thing: growing in Christ.

The guy treating this like a holding pattern is missing what it's actually for.

She can tell when you're chasing her to fill what God was supposed to fill. But a man genuinely walking with God draws the right person without strategizing for it. The prayer isn't "give me a wife." It's "make me the man worth marrying."

And formation doesn't wait for the wedding. The hard conversations, the early mornings in the Word, the things you kill and the things you build — that work happens now.

Colossians 2:10 — "You are complete in him." Not when you're married. Not when you've arrived. Now.

Save this for the brother who's waiting for life to start.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #singleness #godlymen #manofgod #formation #christianity #1corinthians7
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
